ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the player has */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "injury_risk" REAL /* Injury risk score of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom this stat is recorded */,
  "att" INTEGER /* Total attempts made by the player */,
  "yds" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "y_r" REAL /* Average yards gained per attempt */,
  "ybc" INTEGER /* Total yards after catch by the player */,
  "ybc_avg" REAL /* Average yards after catch */,
  "yac" INTEGER /* Total yards gained after the catch */,
  "yac_avg" REAL /* Average yards gained after the catch */,
  "ybc_perc" REAL /* Percentage of yards before contact */,
  "20_plus_perc" REAL /* Percentage of plays that gained 20+ yards */,
  "stf_perc" REAL /* Percentage of successful plays */,
  "bt" INTEGER /* Total broken tackles */,
  "bt_perc" REAL /* Percentage of broken tackles */,
  "neg" INTEGER /* Total negative plays */,
  "neg_perc" REAL /* Percentage of negative plays */,
  "fd" INTEGER /* Total first downs achieved */,
  "fd_perc" REAL /* Percentage of first downs achieved */,
  "suc" INTEGER /* Total successful plays */,
  "suc_perc" REAL /* Percentage of successful plays */,
  "rtd" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns */,
  "exr" INTEGER /* Total explosive runs */,
  "exr_perc" REAL /* Percentage of explosive runs */,
  "gum" INTEGER /* Total goal line usage */,
  "gum_perc" REAL /* Percentage of goal line usage */,
  "agum_perc" REAL /* Average yards to gain */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles */,
  "fumble_perc" REAL /* Percentage of fumbles */,
  "use_perc" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "avr_to_gain" REAL /* Average yards to gain on cuts */,
  "cut_over_perc" REAL /* Percentage of cuts that led to success */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific game for which the stats are recorded */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season identifier (e.g., 2023) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status during the game */,
  "rest_days" INTEGER /* Number of rest days before the game */,
  "physical_condition" TEXT /* Physical condition during the game */,
  "mental_condition" TEXT /* Mental condition during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played in the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "home_game" INTEGER /* Indicates if it was a home game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season identifier (e.g., 2023) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "tv_station" TEXT /* Name of the TV station broadcasting the game */,
  "tv_rating" REAL /* TV rating of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Estimated return date for the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific game during which the injury occurred */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Location of the injury */,
  "rehab_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of rehabilitation in days */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury */,
  "recovery_progress" REAL /* Percentage of recovery progress */,
  "injury_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the coach */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "coaching_philosophy" TEXT /* Coaching philosophy of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom this stat is recorded */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season identifier (e.g., 2023) */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained in the season */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored in the season */,
  "total_passes" INTEGER /* Total number of passes made by the player in the season */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total number of receptions made by the player in the season */,
  "total_interceptions" INTEGER /* Total number of interceptions thrown by the player in the season */,
  "total_sacks" INTEGER /* Total number of sacks made by the player in the season */,
  "total_tackles" INTEGER /* Total number of tackles made by the player in the season */,
  "total_kicks" INTEGER /* Total number of kicks made by the player in the season */,
  "total_punts" INTEGER /* Total number of punts made by the player in the season */,
  "total_kickoff_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of kickoff returns made by the player in the season */,
  "total_punt_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of punt returns made by the player in the season */,
  "total_fumbles_forced" INTEGER /* Total number of fumbles forced by the player in the season */,
  "total_fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of fumbles recovered by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_calls" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play call */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game during which the play occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play called (e.g., run, pass) */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the play was successful */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play */,
  "play_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the play */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained during the play */,
  "time_of_play" TEXT /* Time at which the play occurred during the game */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter during which the play occurred */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down during which the play occurred */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to go for a first down during the play */,
  "play_type_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the play type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_calls_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_calls_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
